decision.reason: Need precise setup dates for both devices. Current evidence has approximate times (a month ago vs 3 weeks ago) but need more precise or corroborating evidence to determine which was first.

Evidence shows smart thermostat set up 'a month ago' (approx 2023-04-25) and mesh network system upgraded '3 weeks ago' (approx 2023-05-04). Since 2023-04-25 is before 2023-05-04, the smart thermostat was set up first. Both required facts are present.
